title: Adapter Profile
description: Schema for Adapter EOSC Resource (Adapter profile for EOSC Registry).

LinkedResource.description: Reference to an EOSC Service or EOSC Interoperability Guideline that this adapter supports.

resourceID.description: Unique ID of the linked resource (must exist in the Registry).

Creator.description: A person or legal entity responsible for producing the adapter/artifact.

nameFirst.description: The full name of the creator. Recommended format: 'Surname, Name'.

nameLast.description: The full name of the creator. Recommended format: 'Surname, Name'.

role.description: The role of the creator (use CRediT vocabulary where possible).

PIDSchema.description: PID schema used for creator identifier (e.g. ORCID, ROR.org).

PID.description: Uniquely identifies an individual or legal entity, according to the chosen PID schema.

affiliationName.description: The organizational or institutional affiliation of the creator.

affiliationIdentifier.description: Uniquely identifies the organizational affiliation of the creator (e.g. ROR.org, ISNI, Wikidata).

QABadge.description: Software quality scores/badges for the adapter.

catalogueId.description: The ID of the catalogue this adapter originates from.

changeLog.description: Changes in the latest version (HTML allowed).

creators.description: The main researchers involved in producing the adapter, or the authors, in priority order.

description.description: Long description of the adapter (HTML allowed).

id.description: Unique resource/entry ID (unique identifier for this adapter record).

license.description: Software/Code license (e.g., MIT, Apache, GPL). Use SPDX identifiers where possible. See https://spdx.org/licenses/

linkedResource.description: EOSC Service or Interoperability Guideline reference that this adapter supports. Chosen from a list of guidelines/services in the Registry.

logo.description: Logo image link. Accepts PNG or JPEG.

node.description: Implementation node or deployment identifier (format TBD).

notes.description: Optional notes and QA software quality scores/badges.

package.description: Link(s) to latest package release page (e.g., PyPI project, Docker image, GitHub releases page). May evolve into a list of objects as packages can be platform-dependent.

programmingLanguage.description: Programming language the adapter is written in (use controlled vocabulary where possible).

softwareRepository.description: Code repository webpage (e.g., GitHub repository). Should be a link to a specific version of the repository according to 'version', e.g. release that has been checked before approval.
